changelog.change: Settings UI cleanup: removed visible first-movement backup checkbox and reflowed reset checkbox text to fit on two lines.
Settings UI refresh (new labels/tooltips/known-issues panel), reset master toggle now controls all reset paths, and paused/ended restart detection hardened.
Paused/ended timers now auto reset + start on detected new-run start signal; versioning normalized to 1.0.2.0.
Fallback end now requires truck-presence drop+return cycle; improved restart-loop signal for paused/ended timer states.
Narrow end fallback to CCTV truck-presence (0xA0), add pause-menu recency suppression, and harden auto-restart guards.
Truck-end fallback now uses CCTV truck-state booleans; pause-leave check tightened to reduce journal false positives.
End fallback now uses local player truck-list presence from CCTVController instead of non-menu transition.
Deterministic end/reset fallback: non-menu load transitions split, menu-driven transitions reset.
Improve truck-end detection by accepting truck trigger occupancy and widening list parsing bounds.
Fix auto-restart reset/start loop and improve truck-end detection using local player trigger ownership.
First Real Release with Start, End, and Reset options
